hero.title: Kusuka ekudzingeni kufinyeleleka kuya ku-repo yasemphakatsini
hero.lead: I-IATF isita tinhlangano, emacembu kanye nebantfu ngamunye kutsi bagucule tidzingo tabo te-accessibility kutsi tibe yimiklamo yemitfombo levulekile.
support: Imiklamo leyemukelwako ishicilelwa ku-IATF GitHub ngaphansi kwelayisensi ye-copyleft futsi itfutfukiswa emphakatsini ngunjiniyela loneligunya.

paragraphs: Ngekusebentisa lifomu, nobe ngubani angafaka inkinga yekufinyeleleka ku-IATF.
Onkhe emaphrojekthi lamukelekile anendzawo levakalako yasemphakatsini yemakhodi, tinkinga, imiculu, kanye nekukhishwa, nekutfutfukiswa lokuholwa ngasese ngunjiniyela lonemtfwalo.

header.title: Indlela lesebenta ngayo
header.intro: Lomklamo uhlelwe kutsi ube mncane kute kube melula kulandzela indlela yawonkhe muntfu.

steps.title: Kuletfwa kwesidzingo
paragraphs: Inhlangano, licembu nobe umuntfu ngamunye angafaka sicelo lesisekelwe esidzingweni mbamba sekufinyeleleka.
Ticelo tingacala ngekusebentisa lelikhasi langcondvomshini, nge-imeyili ku: contact@iatf.cc, nobe nge-Discord.

steps.title: I-IATF uyayihlola
paragraphs: Sihlola kutsi lomsebenti uyahambisana yini nalomsebenti, kutsi uyasebenta yini nekutsi uyafaneleka yini kutsi ube yincenye yemklamo wemtfombo lovulekile.

steps.title: Kusungulwa kwesitolo semlayeto semphakatsi
paragraphs: Uma iphrojekthi yemukelekile, ishicilelwa ku-GitHub ngaphansi kwelayisensi ye-copyleft.
Lencwajana iba likhaya lemtsetfo, tinkinga, imiculu kanye nekukhishwa kwetincwadzi.

steps.title: Injiniyela lonelikhono nguye lohola lomsebenti
paragraphs: Lonjiniyela lonemtfwalo uniketwe indzawo yekugcina imiculu futsi nekutfutfukiswa kwenteka emphakatsini.

header.title: Tfola umsebenti lowentiwako nobe ucale umklamo lotsite

paragraphs: Sebentisa lelirekhodi kute ubone kutsi yini leseyivele isemtsetfweni, nobe ucale kungena nangabe inkinga letsite yekufinyeleleka kufanele ibe ngumklamo.
